raw_question: 2022-2025年第三季度，哪家公司的营业总收入复合增长率最高？请展示增长率（%）
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"2022-2025年第三季度，哪家公司的营业总收入复合增长率最高？请展示增长率（%）"}]

query_plan.question: 2022-2025年第三季度，哪家公司的营业总收入复合增长率最高？请展示增长率（%）

sql: WITH growth AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2022Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS revenue_start, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS revenue_end FROM financials_view WHERE report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2025Q3') GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr HAVING revenue_start IS NOT NULL AND revenue_end IS NOT NULL AND revenue_start > 0), cagr AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, (POWER(revenue_end / revenue_start, 1.0 / 3) - 1) * 100 AS cagr_percentage FROM growth) SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, cagr_percentage FROM cagr ORDER BY cagr_percentage DESC LIMIT 1
sql_history: WITH growth AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2022Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS revenue_start, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS revenue_end FROM financials_view WHERE report_period IN ('2022Q3', '2025Q3') GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr HAVING revenue_start IS NOT NULL AND revenue_end IS NOT NULL AND revenue_start > 0), cagr AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, (POWER(revenue_end / revenue_start, 1.0 / 3) - 1) * 100 AS cagr_percentage FROM growth) SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, cagr_percentage FROM cagr ORDER BY cagr_percentage DESC LIMIT 1
